ab: Shiga o musa sbrigan smbarig ka yaku ni bubu rudan, madas egu bi ssama nhuma na nanaq ka bubu rudan, smmalu uuqun Seejiq Tnpusu uri biqan na ana ima.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: Smkuxul bi sbrigan bubu rudan ka kana seejiq, hbaraw bi seejiq marig usik ni bunga, hbaraw bi seejiq miyah mkan nhapuy hnpuyan na.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和地瓜很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and sweet potato, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: Lmala ni hlama dhquy hnpuyan na o malu balay uqan, niqan muduh hiyi bowyak uri, hmguc hbaraw lupung mniyah ka knux na, miyah tqnay sbrigan nami kana.
ch: 她煮的過貓和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: Mhapuy siida ka bubu rudan, mniq ku siyaw kmeaguh lupung ka yaku, mjiras ku mlawa siyaw, “Hmaan nanaq kana ka ssama, ini rusi sapuh, iyah marig nhari wah!”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: Ini biyaw qduun smbarig kana ka qyqaya nami da, “Nuxay bi jiyagan su” msa ka bubu rudan.
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: Euda nii, wada ku smluhay pnegluban quri knkla pnhmaan ni uqun Seejiq Tnpusu, duri ni mkrbuk muda smbarig.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: Qmita ku bubu rudan smkuxul bi uuqun Seejiq Tnpusu smparu ni mqaras bi lnglungan mu.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
